bird.name: 麻斑鸭
bird.summary: 麻斑鴨（學名：Anas melleri）是一種鑽水鴨，是馬達加斯加東部的特有種，十八世紀中葉起亦在模里西斯建立族群，但可能已因棲地破壞與當地其他種鴨的競爭而消失。麻斑鴨的種小名為紀念植物學家查爾斯·詹姆士·梅勒（Charles James Meller）。 外形 麻斑鴨的外形與…

relations.subject: 麻斑鸭
relations.evidence: Although a population was established on Mauritius in the mid-18th century, this is on the verge of extinction due to habitat loss and competition by feral domestic ducks. The species name of this species is after the botanist Charles James Meller, and its generic name is from the Latin for "duck"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
